arts.sum: Their woes on the availability front have seemingly worsened ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash with Hoffenheim, but Postecoglou should get some of his players back next month. CM: Lucas Bergvall - The teenage Swede has stood out amid Spurs' tumult and will continue in the side with Pape Sarr the latest to succumb to Tottenham's injury bug.

arts.ttl: Leeds boss Daniel Farke gets his wish as Manor Solomon stars in Norwich win
arts.sum: Leeds reclaimed top spot in the Championship with a 2-0 win over Norwich courtesy of a Manor Solomon masterclass to warm up for next week's clash with promotion rivals Burnley

arts.ttl: EL 2024/25 state of play: Man Utd, Spurs and Rangers looking to secure top-eight spot
arts.sum: The revamped Europa League league stage is coming towards a conclusion.
Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou says his players are "giving everything in every game" and have a "fantastic opportunity" to enjoy a successful season.

arts.ttl: West Ham 2-1 Tottenham: Player ratings as Hammers clinch spot in League Cup semi-finals
arts.sum: Player ratings from the Premier League clash between Chelsea and Wolves at Stamford Bridge.

You really need a strong squad of players and keep them healthy to cope with playing in Europe if you do well in the cup competitions like we have because it’s not manageable when you’ve got three games a week for the length of time we have. We’ve probably got 13 first team players who’ve travelled.

arts.ttl: 'Everyone will be open to that': Tim Sherwood shares what Tottenham should now do in the transfer window
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur hit the ground running in the January transfer window but things have slowed down on that front since then. Spurs were quick out...

arts.ttl: Spurs' woes continue with Pape Matar Sarr injury
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been dealt another injury blow manager Ange Postecoglou confirming Pape Matar Sarr will miss the side's Europa League trip to Hoffenheim on Thursday.
Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou says his players are "giving everything in every game" and have a "fantastic opportunity" to enjoy a successful season.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero back in Tottenham training but will not be ready for Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Romero’s continued absence means Spurs will be without 14 players for their clash in Hoffenheim.
